news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues to expand its single stock Leveraged ETF suite with OPEN, CIFR, GRAB, DUOL, LAC, and UPS

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long OPEN Daily ETF (OPEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: OPEN) stock, less fees, and expenses OPEG was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.

data.title: Leverage Shares by Themes continues to expand its single stock Leveraged ETF suite with OPEN, CIFR, GRAB, DUOL, LAC, and UPS
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 11, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes unveil six new single stock leveraged ETFs, available for trading starting December 11, 2025. These products are designed ...
